title: Duet Design System – UI Framework from LocalTapiola
content: Duet from Directories: Components: Duet Design System serves as the foundational framework for LocalTapiola and Turva's digital products, including organized tools, patterns, and practices. Design System provides wide library of reusable components, clear design standards, and strong theming guidelines across products. Duet establishes a shared vocabulary, ensuring a unified user experience and clear standards in the design language.
